courseName: (Free Solution) Week 4 Assignment Check-In Direct Care Project Part 2 Planning the Presentation NR 443

questions.question: A patient with (Free Solution) Assignment Check In Direct Care Project Part Planning the Presentation presents with sudden shortness of breath, tachycardia, and anxiety. What is the nurse's highest priority action?
options: Document the symptoms in the chart
Assess airway patency and respiratory effort
questions.explanation: Airway and breathing are the highest priorities in an acute respiratory emergency before medication or diagnostic tests.

questions.question: Which finding is most consistent with early (Free Solution) Assignment Check In Direct Care Project Part Planning the Presentation decompensation in a hospitalized patient?
options: Stable blood pressure with warm skin
questions.explanation: In early decompensation, respiratory distress and mental status changes appear before stable vital signs improve.

questions.question: A nurse is teaching a patient about managing (Free Solution) Assignment Check In Direct Care Project Part Planning the Presentation. Which statement shows the patient understands the plan?
options: I will call the clinic if my breathing gets worse
I will stop water intake completely
I will only use oxygen when the nurse is present
I will skip my medication when I feel better
questions.explanation: Appropriate self-monitoring and knowing when to seek help are key patient education outcomes.

questions.question: The best nursing diagnosis for a patient experiencing (Free Solution) Assignment Check In Direct Care Project Part Planning the Presentation with fluid overload is:
options: Risk for infection related to intravenous therapy
Impaired skin integrity related to immobility
Excess fluid volume related to impaired cardiac output
questions.explanation: Fluid overload linked to cardiac or renal compromise is best described as excess fluid volume.

questions.question: Which lab value should the nurse monitor most closely for a patient with (Free Solution) Assignment Check In Direct Care Project Part Planning the Presentation?
questions.explanation: Potassium fluctuations are especially important in patients with cardiopulmonary or renal concerns.

questions.question: A student prepares for the (Free Solution) Assignment Check In Direct Care Project Part Planning the Presentation exam. Which study strategy is most effective?
options: Read only one chapter the night before
questions.explanation: Active practice with rationales helps students retain concepts and improves exam performance better than passive reading.

questions.question: Which medication should the nurse question for a patient with (Free Solution) Assignment Check In Direct Care Project Part Planning the Presentation and decreased oxygen saturation?
questions.explanation: Sedating opioids can worsen respiratory depression and should be questioned when oxygenation is unstable.

questions.question: What is the most likely priority concern when a patient with (Free Solution) Assignment Check In Direct Care Project Part Planning the Presentation develops confusion and restlessness?
questions.explanation: Altered mental status in an acute care patient is often an early sign of hypoxia or inadequate perfusion.
